decision_rules: Execute all 96 unique recipes and preserve every invalid row, target miss, and native checkpoint.
Depth-match every trajectory before comparing CD, sidewall angle, bow, or scallop.
Low, nominal, and high factor anchors and every predeclared 2x2 interaction corner must remain exact sampled recipes.
A modeled or observed effect above its V3 screen threshold creates a confirmation hypothesis only; one stream per recipe cannot confirm sensitivity.
Use design-input correlation and VIF only to audit the DOE; do not call input correlation a physical interaction.
Report reachability failures and depth-horizon censoring instead of dropping them from the surface.
Do not recommend a recipe, process window, physical gas flow, pressure, power, dose, or focus from this screen.
Do not imply all wired Bosch controls were screened: mask_ion_rate is deferred to a bounded hard-gate challenge and cycle count is delegated to Stage 2c.
Stage 1 pattern skew may execute in parallel and is not a Stage 2a prerequisite; cross-stage interaction work waits for both reviews.

input_independence_preflight.interpretation: design-input independence only; knob-output associations are reported separately

design.method: exact nominal/OFAT/prior/interaction anchors plus maximin optimized Latin hypercube interior

planned_term_alias_preflight.interpretation: centered main and predeclared interaction terms; descriptive alias audit, not a physical effect result

excluded_wired_controls.evidence_status: boundary-limited: 0 through -0.04 tested and survived; the frozen -0.05/-0.06/-0.08 failure bracket did not run
excluded_wired_controls.exclusion_rationale: mask erosion/selectivity is a distinct hard-gate challenge and must not be mixed into the nominal-morphology response surface
excluded_wired_controls.name: mask_ion_rate
excluded_wired_controls.required_followup: run a separately frozen bounded mask-erosion/selectivity challenge before any mask-process-margin claim

excluded_wired_controls.exclusion_rationale: varying cycle count independently here would break the required depth-matched morphology comparison
excluded_wired_controls.held_value: selected by per-recipe depth matching up to 30 cycles
excluded_wired_controls.name: num_cycles

factors.expected_mechanism: changes the ion and neutral etch dose delivered in every Bosch etch phase
factors.name: etch_time
factors.range_basis: active V3 broad range; covers the depth-matched 0.2 lower challenge, accepted 0.5 reference, and historical 2.0 failure

factors.expected_mechanism: sets the initial opening etch before cyclic passivation begins
factors.name: initial_etch_time
factors.range_basis: active V3 broad range around the 0.3 wrapper/reference value

factors.name: neutral_rate
factors.range_basis: active V3 broad model-sensitivity range; not calibrated gas flow

factors.expected_mechanism: changes where neutral particles react rather than reflect
factors.name: neutral_sticking_probability
factors.range_basis: complete active V3 probability range and prior screen bounds

factors.expected_mechanism: sets the passivation dose deposited before each etch phase
factors.name: deposition_thickness
factors.range_basis: active V3 range including thin reference and historical thick-passivation arm

factors.expected_mechanism: changes the spatial distribution of passivation deposition
factors.name: deposition_sticking_probability
factors.range_basis: active V3 transport range inside probability bounds

factors.expected_mechanism: controls the angular concentration of incident ions
factors.name: ion_source_exponent
factors.range_basis: active V3 angular-source range and exact prior endpoints

factors.expected_mechanism: controls the minimum ion reflection angle at surfaces
factors.name: theta_r_min
factors.range_basis: active V3 reflection-angle range; not calibrated platen power

factors.name: ion_rate
factors.range_basis: active V3 model-sensitivity range expanded beyond legacy endpoints

predeclared_interactions.basis: both jointly set ion-driven displacement per cycle; exact 2x2 anchors prevent a product alias from being mistaken for separate main effects
etch duration and neutral coefficient jointly set neutral-driven displacement per cycle
etch duration can change the effect of neutral reaction-versus-reflection probability
neutral reaction strength and spatial reaction probability are physically coupled model controls
historical depth-matched evidence reported a passivation-dose effect that changed with etch duration
passivation amount and spatial distribution jointly control protected wall area
incident angular distribution and surface reflection rule jointly determine transported ion angles

design.question: Across the broad V3 ranges of the nine active Bosch morphology controls at nominal pattern geometry, which controls, curvature terms, and predeclared interactions create engineering-visible changes in depth reachability and depth-matched via morphology?

rng_policy.assignment: one globally non-overlapping process-seed interval per recipe; no stream is reused inside this stage
rng_policy.interpretation: independent broad coverage for screening; one stream per recipe cannot estimate within-recipe stochastic variance or confirm an effect

design.screen_threshold_policy: effective threshold = max(practical engineering change, released R1 numerical shift, two grid cells for geometry outputs, 3*sqrt(2)*sample SD from the four disjoint released nominal 2000-ray baselines); the independent-stream screen remains hypothesis-only and finalists require recipe-specific replication

trajectory.selection: minimum absolute depth error among valid checkpoints; an in-window checkpoint outranks every miss

provenance.design_role: broad Bosch effect and interaction hypothesis generation, not optimization
provenance.noise_status: thresholds include 3*sqrt(2)*sample SD from the four disjoint released nominal 2,000-ray baselines; recipe-specific replication is still required for confirmation
provenance.stage1_dependency: none; nominal-pattern Stage 2a is scientifically separable
provenance.stage1_launch_order: Stage 1 runs first only to allocate the two available workers to the earliest checkpoint
